ground_truth.title: Yoga layout engine version update?
ground_truth.author: Sebioff
ground_truth.main_content:
Are there any plans to update to the latest Yoga version as part of Unity 6 (or Unity 7?). It would be great to get support for things like gap or align-content: space-evenly.

Unity staff member benoitd_unity responded: We have considered it but decided not to go ahead with it. Our Yoga implementation diverged significantly, and updating it might be risky. That said, we could still implement gap and other properties on top of it.

Community member Sebioff requested additional CSS properties: z-index, picking mode from USS, align-content: space-between/space-around, row-gap, column-gap, and aspect-ratio.

Other community members expressed support for gap implementation, with several noting they have similar code workarounds in their projects that would be simplified with aspect-ratio support. ManuelRauber confirmed that the divergence will likely lock Unity out of modern improvements for an extended period.
with: Are there any plans to update to the latest Yoga version as part of Unity 6 (or Unity 7?)
It would be great to get support for things like gap or align-content: space-evenly
We have considered it but decided not to go ahead with it. Our Yoga implementation diverged significantly, and updating it might be risky
That said, we could still implement gap and other properties on top of it
One more: aspect-ratio would be quite useful too
